title: Montra Connect
subtitle: EV Management App
description: A full-featured EV application supporting real-time vehicle tracking, battery monitoring, and charging station locator with native voice features.
problem: Fleet operators and drivers lacked precise, low-latency tracking, battery status projections, and hands-free voice operations while on the move.
solution: Developed a robust React Native app with Google Maps integration, live battery telemetry, and a custom native Swift speech-to-text module for secure, local voice processing.

title: AIRA
subtitle: Internal AI Assistant
description: A full-stack internal AI chatbot featuring web and mobile interfaces integrated with Model Context Protocol (MCP) for real-time operational data access.
problem: Team members at Montra Electric spent significant time performing manual data lookups, slowing down information sharing and cross-team workflows.
solution: Designed and built a full-stack internal AI assistant with Next.js web and React Native mobile interfaces. Implemented a Fastify + Node.js API layer with MCP server integration to connect LLMs with MySQL operational data and BigQuery analytics.

title: Zyox
subtitle: Catering & Smart Food Ordering App
description: A premium catering and smart food ordering application featuring interactive chef logs and customized menu planner dashboards.
problem: Traditional online catering systems are rigid, causing massive communication gaps between clients and chefs. This results in inaccurate order quantities, mismatched dietary requirements, and logistical chaos during event execution.
solution: Designed a real-time chef communication interface with interactive cooking logs and a dynamic menu planner. The platform automatically calculates portion scaling, translates custom dietary restrictions into ingredient checklists, and provides instant kitchen telemetry updates.

title: iSportz
subtitle: Sports Fan Engagement Platform
description: A vibrant sports engagement application connecting fans through live scores, personalised feeds, social groups, and merchandise features.
problem: Amateur leagues and sports fans lacked a single platform to follow live brackets, interact, share customized feeds, and coordinate merchandise purchases.
solution: Built and optimized React Native/React JS frontend modules with clean custom hooks for reusable business logic, event-driven architectures, and streamlined releases.

title: EndLoop
subtitle: Your Sarcastic Phone Coach
description: A digital wellbeing app that helps users break repetitive phone-usage loops and endless scrolling habits.
problem: Users switch between apps without purpose, repeatedly open the same apps, and waste hours in mindless scrolling loops because standard screen-time monitors lack engaging or effective interventions.
solution: Built a React Native mobile app that detects usage patterns and interrupts scrolling habits with sarcastic, humorous, and slightly roasting notifications from its mascot to call out and break the loop.

title: Invafresh
subtitle: Retail Demand Forecasting
description: A cross-platform mobile and web application managing demand forecasting across fresh food retail merchandising.
problem: Fresh food retail operations suffered from high inventory waste and inaccurate process management due to inefficient demand forecasting systems.
solution: Built a forecasting application that improved process management accuracy by 25%, optimizing inventory replenishment and minimizing waste.

title: HBCU Spark
subtitle: College Discovery App
description: Search-and-filter web application designed for students to explore and discover HBCU colleges seamlessly.
problem: Students seeking HBCU colleges lacked intuitive, fast, and unified filtering tools to discover institutions matching their exact criteria.
solution: Created a college search web app featuring clean UX layouts and advanced query filtering that boosted user engagement by 40%.
